caption: A split-screen video display features a woman and a man in separate locations. On the left, a woman with red hair and red earrings wears a blue patterned shirt; she is speaking and shifting her expression slightly. On the right, a man with glasses and a beard wears a blue shirt, appearing to listen and then speaking. Behind the woman is a wall with green string lights, and behind the man is a room with a framed picture and a sign that says "OPEN". A blue banner across the bottom contains the text "FOCUS with Margaret Harrington" on the left and "No More Time Climate Crisis Poems by Greg Delanty" on the right, accompanied by a "TOWN MEETING TV" logo. As the sequence progresses, the woman continues talking while the man transitions from a thoughtful expression with his hand near his chin to speaking.
